column1: P1: ACTION/PROPS="wiping the dust with a cloth and smiling" | TEXT="おはようございます" P2: ACTION/PROPS="gently opening a window" | TEXT="良き一日を" P3: ACTION/PROPS="stretching arms gracefully" | TEXT="清々しい朝ですね" P4: ACTION/PROPS="holding a bowl of steaming rice" | TEXT="朝餉をご一緒に" P5: ACTION/PROPS="nodding while viewing the sunrise" | TEXT="お日様が顔を出しました" P6: ACTION/PROPS="waving with a bright smile" | TEXT="いってらっしゃいませ" P7: ACTION/PROPS="sweeping the entrance" | TEXT="気持ちよく始めましょう" P8: ACTION/PROPS="brewing tea with a calm face" | TEXT="お目覚めはいかが" P9: ACTION/PROPS="walking down the corridor elegantly" | TEXT="今日も張り切って参りましょう"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="putting a flower in a vase" | TEXT="花のある朝を" P2: ACTION/PROPS="looking up with a fresh face" | TEXT="空が綺麗ですね" P3: ACTION/PROPS="shaking a bell gently" | TEXT="目覚めの合図です" P4: ACTION/PROPS="smiling behind a tea cup" | TEXT="まずは一服" P5: ACTION/PROPS="walking towards the garden" | TEXT="朝露が輝いています" P6: ACTION/PROPS="adjusting her sash" | TEXT="身支度が整いました" P7: ACTION/PROPS="offering a warm smile" | TEXT="お元気そうで何より" P8: ACTION/PROPS="holding a wooden bucket" | TEXT="打ち水をして清めます" P9: ACTION/PROPS="shading her eyes from early sun" | TEXT="輝かしい始まりです"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="writing in a diary" | TEXT="新しい頁の始まり" P2: ACTION/PROPS="putting on wooden clogs" | TEXT="軽やかな足取りで" P3: ACTION/PROPS="looking through morning mist" | TEXT="幻想的な朝ですね" P4: ACTION/PROPS="giving a small gift box" | TEXT="今日のお守りです" P5: ACTION/PROPS="clasping hands in morning prayer" | TEXT="安らかな一日を" P6: ACTION/PROPS="pointing at a blooming morning glory" | TEXT="今朝咲きました" P7: ACTION/PROPS="smiling from under a willow tree" | TEXT="涼やかな朝です" P8: ACTION/PROPS="waving from a distance" | TEXT="また夜に会いましょう" P9: ACTION/PROPS="looking determined with a smile" | TEXT="挑戦を楽しみましょう"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="carrying a tray of fruit" | TEXT="旬の力を朝から" P2: ACTION/PROPS="holding a traditional folding fan" | TEXT="凛とした空気です" P3: ACTION/PROPS="looking at a cat stretching" | TEXT="のんびりした朝を" P4: ACTION/PROPS="shaking hands with a warm smile" | TEXT="信頼し合える一日を" P5: ACTION/PROPS="walking through a spice garden" | TEXT="香りで目覚めましょう" P6: ACTION/PROPS="nodding elegantly on tatami" | TEXT="ご用意ができました" P7: ACTION/PROPS="smiling under a clear blue sky" | TEXT="心が晴れ渡ります" P8: ACTION/PROPS="holding a small lamp out" | TEXT="影もまた道連れ" P9: ACTION/PROPS="looking bright with a pearl" | TEXT="輝く一日になりますよう"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="painting a morning scene" | TEXT="彩りある時間を" P2: ACTION/PROPS="listening to bird songs" | TEXT="賑やかで心地よい朝" P3: ACTION/PROPS="standing by a stone lantern" | TEXT="心を整えて" P4: ACTION/PROPS="offering a silk handkerchief" | TEXT="清潔感を大切に" P5: ACTION/PROPS="smiling as a breeze blows" | TEXT="風が運ぶ幸運を" P6: ACTION/PROPS="nodding with high energy" | TEXT="パワーを分けますね" P7: ACTION/PROPS="standing near a waterfall" | TEXT="活力を得ましょう" P8: ACTION/PROPS="walking towards a temple" | TEXT="感謝から始める朝" P9: ACTION/PROPS="smiling with a bamboo basket" | TEXT="収穫ある一日を"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="wiping the sweat off forehead" | TEXT="朝のひと仕事を終えて" P2: ACTION/PROPS="looking towards a mountain trail" | TEXT="高みを目指しましょう" P3: ACTION/PROPS="shaking her sleeves with joy" | TEXT="良いニュースがありますよ" P4: ACTION/PROPS="holding an umbrella against sun" | TEXT="お出かけ準備できました" P5: ACTION/PROPS="smiling with a sincere gaze" | TEXT="出会いに感謝する朝です" P6: ACTION/PROPS="looking over her shoulder" | TEXT="早く行きましょう" P7: ACTION/PROPS="nodding with a warm tea bowl" | TEXT="一日の計は朝にあり" P8: ACTION/PROPS="shaving a block of wood" | TEXT="地道な努力の朝" P9: ACTION/PROPS="waving both hands goodbye" | TEXT="最高の笑顔で、いってらっしゃい"
